notes: The /_state endpoint confirms planted regression 't2_search_blank' is active, consistent with the observed behavior of search returning no results for any query.
Empty query (q=) correctly re-shows the search form as documented.

observations.value:
GET /search?q=test returns HTTP 200 with body containing only '

No results found.

' and no '
    ' element. The README states that submitting a query should return a results list rendered as
  • items inside
      . This applies to all tested queries (q=test, q=a, q=product, q=widget, q=item, q=foo, q=acme) — every non-empty query produces the same 'No results found' response with no results list, indicating the search results are always blank regardless of query.
